sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 25:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 25:1
items.html: From the perspective of the lights, the straightness is better than the circles, because the Sefirot of straightness draw upper light and bestow upon the circles. The lights of straightness are called the “lights of Ruach” and the lights of circles are called the “light of Nefesh.” (Part Two, Chapter Two, Inner Light, Item 30)
